headline: GE HealthCare appoints medtech leader Kevin Lobo to Board of Directors
summary: CHICAGO, March 17, 2026--GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) announced today the appointment of Kevin A. Lobo, Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Stryker Corporation (NYSE: SYK), to its Board of Directors effective March 13. Mr. Lobo brings more than 25 years of medical technology, operational, and financial leadership experience. His clinical expertise and track record of driving innovation and scaling global businesses make him well qualified to contribute to GE HealthCare’s strategic priorities.

headline: Cyberattack And SmartHospital Push Could Be A Game Changer For Stryker (SYK)
summary: In early March 2026, Stryker suffered a destructive cyberattack that wiped data from over 200,000 systems and disrupted order processing, manufacturing and shipping across dozens of countries, even as the company reported that products remained safe to use. At the same time, Stryker has been expanding its digital and orthopaedic offerings with its new SmartHospital platform and fresh additions to the Mako and Triathlon portfolios, underscoring how its innovation agenda is running in...
